first_dialog: *She is reading what appears to be a manual for some kind of programming language.*
Wait, what? Sorry, no can do, I'm on my break right now and I don't do customer service.

Okay, fine, if you really want help, I believe the store is still out of stock, the supply chain is completely screwed up and I don't know when it's going to be fixed. At least I can still fish parts out of the landfill to build my gaming PC.
However, I used to work at MicroTech... They fired me after I put in a virus in their new line of robots. They think those dang clankers can replace my job...
So yeah, I thought I was hosed but then I got a job at this store as IT support. The manager wants the robot fixed but I think someone tripped the backdoor so it's unfixable.
I'm just pretending to do stuff, they don't pay me enough to make me care anyway.
Okay, so back to my main point: I think I can help you get a Swapdeck.
Shh, be quiet, it's through... unofficial channels. I still have some connections at MicroTech and I think I can smuggle one into the store... for a price.

This is just between you and me, okay? I have to figure out some of the details still but come back to me later to talk about this once I have it sorted out. Now I would suggest going to the job board to raise some funds, I want some cash up front.
player_dialog: Um, hi, can you tell me where I can find a Swapdeck?
Oh come on, why is nobody here helping me?!
possible_dialog: I'm busy not working right now, talk to me later.
Ugh, what do you want? I need some alone time right now so can it wait?
Whatever your question is, it's above my pay grade.
